summary: P17-P18-P19 Feature Testing Complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI components tested and verified. Settings page (P17), Vendor Management (P18), and Add Stock Procurement (P19) all working correctly with proper permission gating.
critical_code_review_comments: OperationalSettings.jsx correctly implements 4 setting groups (Hierarchy Policy, Transfer Behavior, Alerts, System)
OperationalSettings.jsx correctly shows 'Set here' vs 'Inherited' badges based on stored_settings
OperationalSettings.jsx correctly triggers ConfirmActionDialog for dangerous toggles (allow_child_direct_vendor_purchase)
VendorManagement.jsx correctly shows BLOCKED state when VENDOR_PURCHASE_NOT_ALLOWED error returned
VendorManagement.jsx correctly gates Edit/Delete buttons to master-only (canEdit = isTopLevel)
VendorManagement.jsx correctly allows Add for master + central (canCreate = isTopLevel || isCentral)
AddStockPurchaseForm.jsx correctly implements multi-line item entry with Add Another Item button
AddStockPurchaseForm.jsx correctly shows confirmation step before submitting
AddStockPurchaseForm.jsx correctly handles bill/invoice file upload (accepts images and PDFs)
screenVisibility.js correctly defines scr-settings as master-only (HIDDEN for central/franchise)
screenVisibility.js correctly defines scr-vendors as master+central (HIDDEN for franchise)
screenVisibility.js correctly defines scr-procurement as master+central (HIDDEN for franchise)
Sidebar.jsx correctly renders nav items based on getVisibleNavItems(restaurantType)
OperationsHub.jsx correctly shows Procurement section only when canDo('add-stock-purchase')
api.js getVendors correctly normalizes raw array response from POS API
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: P17-P18-P19 fully tested. Current state: allow_child_direct_vendor_purchase is FALSE at master level. Central/franchise see BLOCKED state for vendors/procurement. To test central vendor access with flag ON: enable via Settings page as master first. Master has 12 existing vendors. All permission gating working correctly.

features_tested.1_backend_proxy_health: PASS - GET /api/ returns 'Central Inventory API Proxy' message
features_tested.2_master_login: PASS - abhishek@kalabahia.com login successful, rid=1, type=master
features_tested.3_central_login: PASS - owner@democentral2.com login successful, rid=782, type=central
features_tested.4_franchise_login: PASS - owner@demofranchise4.com login successful, rid=786, type=franchise
features_tested.5_settings_page_master: PASS - All 4 groups render (Hierarchy Policy, Transfer Behavior, Alerts, System)
features_tested.6_settings_toggles_and_inputs: PASS - Toggles and number inputs present with correct values
features_tested.7_settings_inherited_badges: PASS - 'Set here' badges visible for stored settings
features_tested.8_settings_dangerous_toggle: PASS - Confirmation dialog appears for allow_child_direct_vendor_purchase with hierarchy warning
features_tested.9_settings_visibility_central: PASS - Central user does NOT see /settings in sidebar nav
features_tested.10_settings_visibility_franchise: PASS - Franchise user does NOT see /settings in sidebar nav
features_tested.11_vendors_page_master: PASS - Vendor table with 12 vendors, search works, Add/Edit/Delete buttons visible
features_tested.12_vendors_create_master: PASS - Add Vendor dialog opens with all form fields
features_tested.13_vendors_edit_master: PASS - Edit button visible and functional for master
features_tested.14_vendors_delete_master: PASS - Delete button visible for master
features_tested.15_vendors_central_blocked: PASS - Central sees BLOCKED state (VENDOR_PURCHASE_NOT_ALLOWED) when flag is OFF
features_tested.16_vendors_franchise_hidden: PASS - Franchise does NOT see /vendors in sidebar nav
features_tested.17_procurement_page_master: PASS - Form loads with vendor selector, item selector, qty, batch/expiry fields
features_tested.18_procurement_multi_line: PASS - Add Another Item button visible and functional
features_tested.19_procurement_file_upload: PASS - Bill/invoice file upload field accepts images and PDFs
features_tested.20_operations_hub_procurement: PASS - Master sees Procurement section with 'Add Stock (Vendor)' and 'Manage Vendors' buttons

settings_page.badges: 'Set here' for stored settings, 'Inherited' for inherited
